title: Main Usage
description: its made for pure optimizations and pvp,feel free to add your own preferred mods.
body:
### **OPTIMIZATION**

this pack optimizes your game without affecting the vanilla minecraft. it provides all in one solution for every catagory of players such as pvpiers,builders,parkourer and creators.

### **ASTHETICS**

it can load enhanced in game entities and blocks without affecting the in-game optimization. you can add other mods to make your game more alive but this modpack is focused on saving computer resource and provide an open air to breath for low end devices.

### **PVP**

it gives every fair to use mods to provide better pvp experience without loosing the vanilla experience.

> IT is used as my main profile to play minecraft.

```
CAUTION! it may not be compatible with lunar client but it does on feather(remove febric api)

```
### **HERE IS AN IN-GAME SCREENSHOT**
